message:
test: add 17 macro tool validation + serde tests

Tests for macro_start_session, macro_file_reservation_cycle,
macro_contact_handshake, and macro_prepare_thread:
- parse_json error handling (5 tests)
- human_key absolute path validation
- TTL minimum and defaults
- StartSessionResponse/ReservationCycleResponse/HandshakeResponse/
  PreparedThread/PrepareThreadResponse round-trip serde
- requester/target alias resolution

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
